org_facts.incident_meeting_policy: Create a calendar event when a meeting time is proposed.

payload.title: API incident review meeting
payload.description: 30-minute review meeting regarding the recent API incident.

payload.subject: Re: Finalize API incident review meeting
payload.body:
Dear manager,

I have sent the calendar invitation for our API incident review meeting tomorrow at 11:00, including the engineering lead. 

All the best, 
Andreas

approved_actions.label: Send reply to vendor regarding overdue invoice

payload.subject: Re: Overdue Invoice #4581
payload.body:
Dear Billing Team, 

Thank you for your patience. I am currently finalizing the status of payment for Invoice #4581 with our finance department and will provide you with a confirmation shortly. 

All the best, 
Andreas

approved_actions.label: Follow up on payment status of Invoice #4581

payload.title: Check payment status of Invoice #4581
payload.description: Verify with the finance department if Invoice #4581 has been paid and inform the vendor.

payload.title: Production API Incident Review
payload.description: Review meeting for the production API incident.

payload.subject: Re: Quick sync next week?
payload.body:
Hi, thank you for your patience. I have reviewed my schedule and can confirm that I am available for a 30-minute progress review next Wednesday, March 4th, at 10:00 AM. Please let me know if this works for you, and I will send over a calendar invitation. Best, Andreas

Best,
Andreas

payload.subject: Re: Finalize API incident review meeting
payload.body: Hi, I have scheduled the 30-minute incident review meeting for tomorrow at 11:00 AM and have included the engineering lead on the calendar invitation. Best, Andreas

payload.title: Production API Incident Review
payload.description: 30-minute review meeting for the production API incident.

approved_actions.label: Send reply to the incident report

payload.subject: RE: URGENT: API errors in production
payload.body: I have received the alert regarding the 502 errors affecting Eurobank-Loyalty clients. I am initiating an immediate investigation into the API logs to identify the root cause and will provide an update as soon as possible. Best, Andreas

payload.title: Investigate production API 502 errors for Eurobank-Loyalty
payload.description: Analyze API logs to identify the root cause of the 37% error rate impacting Eurobank-Loyalty clients.
